outcomes.description: Create, retrieve, update, and delete items and track their completion status.

scenarios.description: System receives PUT /api/items/{item_id} with path param item_id (int) and query param completed (bool). ItemService.update_item_status fetches the item via ItemRepository.get_by_id (SELECT FROM items WHERE id = item_id); raises HTTPException(status_code=404, detail='Item not found') if the record is absent. If found, calls ItemRepository.update_status which sets item.completed = completed and calls db.commit() + db.refresh() (UPDATE items SET completed=<bool>, updated_at=utcnow WHERE id=item_id). PostgreSQL trigger audit_items_trigger fires INSERT INTO audit_logs(table_name='items', action='UPDATE', record_id=item_id, created_at=NOW()). Returns serialized ItemResponse.

actions.description: Path: item_id (int, required). Query: completed (bool, required). No auth guard. Response model: ItemResponse.

apis.request: item_id: int (path, required), completed: bool (query, required)
apis.response: ItemResponse{id: int, name: str, description: str, completed: bool, created_at: datetime, updated_at: datetime}

actions.description: ItemRepository.get_by_id → db.query(Item).filter(Item.id == item_id).first() → SELECT FROM items WHERE id = item_id; returns None if no matching record
Raises HTTPException(status_code=404, detail='Item not found') if ItemRepository.get_by_id returns None

ItemRepository.update_status sets item.completed = completed and calls db.commit() + db.refresh() → UPDATE items SET completed=<bool>, updated_at=utcnow WHERE id=item_id. PostgreSQL trigger audit_items_trigger (defined in database.py init_db) fires INSERT INTO audit_logs(table_name='items', action='UPDATE', record_id=item_id, created_at=NOW())

Serializes and returns ItemResponse with fields: id (int), name (str), description (str), completed (bool), created_at (datetime), updated_at (datetime). db.refresh() ensures updated_at reflects the committed timestamp.

skippedComponents.reason: Config module only supplies DATABASE_URL to SQLAlchemy engine; no service logic or side effects relevant to this EP

sideEffects.identifier: audit_trigger_func → audit_logs (INSERT via PostgreSQL trigger on items UPDATE)

branchesAndErrors.handledAs: Reject missing item action in Validate item existence step
